CMS (after April 2013), they appear most frequently (2009 forward). The type of prescriber identifier 
used is documented in the PRSCRBR_ID_QLFYR_CD variable. 
Starting with 2014 data, the PRSCRBR_ID can be used to link to the NPI variable in the prescriber 
Characteristics File.
